headline: Global Glass Packaging Market 2035 Outlook | Europe Leads with Owens-Illinois Inc & Amcor Ltd Driving Growth
summary: The global glass packaging market, as analyzed by Future Market Insights, is entering a phase of stable, long-term expansion, driven by sustainability mandates, premium product positioning, and rising demand across beverage, pharmaceutical, and personal care industries. Valued at USD 62.8 billion in 2025, the market is projected to reach USD 97.5 billion by 2035, registering a CAGR of 4.5% over the forecast period.

headline: BofA Cuts Amcor (AMCR) Price Target in Packaging Group Preview
summary: Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR) is included among the 15 Best Low Volatility Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now. On April 6, BofA lowered its price recommendation on Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR) to $48 from $56. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares as part of its preview of the packaging group. A February report by CNBC […]
